title: IMMZD2DTTBEEncepur ValueSet for Decision Table Schema
description: JSON Schema for IMMZD2DTTBEEncepur ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

enum: Client's age is less than 1 year-39
Client is not due for TBE vaccination-48
No TBE primary series doses were administered-112
Client's age is more than or equal to 1 year-39
Client is due for TBE vaccination-44
One TBE primary series dose was administered-112
The latest TBE dose was administered less than 1 month ago-95
The latest TBE dose was administered more than 1 month ago-95
Two TBE primary series doses were administered-112
The latest TBE dose was administered less than 9 months ago-103
The latest TBE dose was administered more than 9 months ago-103
Three TBE primary series doses were administered-112
No TBE booster dose was administered-110
The latest TBE dose was administered less than 3 years ago-102
The primary series is complete. Client is not due for TBE booster dose-138
The latest TBE dose was administered more than 3 years ago-102
At least one booster dose was administered-110
Clinical judgement is required. Create a clinical note-66

narrative: This schema validates Coding-shaped objects for the IMMZD2DTTBEEncepur ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet. Each value must be an object with 'system' (CodeSystem URI) and 'code' (fragment after '#') properties. Display values are available at http://smart.who.int/immunizations/ValueSet-IMMZD2DTTBEEncepurVS.displays.json. The canonical IRI for a code can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code. For a complete listing of all ValueSets, see artifacts.html#terminology-value-sets.
